children.heading: Notifications
children.label: a Notifications
children.text: Not less than 15 days before transferring any defense articles pursuant to , the President shall notify the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate in accordance with the procedures applicable to reprogramming notifications pursuant to .section 2799b(a) of this titlesection 2394–1 of this title
lists all transfers made to each recipient NATO/CFE country by the United States under during the preceding calendar year;section 2799b(a) of this title
describes how those transfers further the purposes described in paragraphs (1) through (3) of ; andsection 2799 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: by each NATO/CFE country (other than the United States) in implementing the CFE Treaty, and

children.label: B
children.text: by each country of the Eastern Group of States Parties in implementing the CFE Treaty.
